notes: Dangerous player-debuffs, keyed by the APPLIED player-aura spell id (the id on SPELL_AURA_APPLIED), grouped by dungeon. JUDGMENT layer only — removableBy/duration/name come from generated/spell-facts.json (DB2). Re-run import:db2 after editing the curation id set.

Optional override: add removableBy:[categories] to an entry to UNION extra tags onto the DB2-derived set (rarely needed — DB2 covered all 32 of these). caster/notes are human hints; the combat log itself identifies the caster at runtime.
priority: 'dangerous' is the curated danger level. Re-add the old validationCandidates here once their applied-aura ids are confirmed against logs.

1214038.name: Ethereal Shackles
1214038.notes: Boss Magic root. Dispel or break the root around overlapping mechanics.

1245068.name: Consuming Void
1245068.notes: Dangerous Magic debuff; dispel promptly, use defensives if applications overlap.

1255187.name: Holy Fire
1255187.notes: Magic DoT; dispel promptly to limit avoidable damage.

1264687.name: Devouring Strike
1264687.notes: Large tank healing absorb; heal through it rather than scoring as a cleanse.

1282055.name: Ethereal Shackles
1282055.notes: Magic root; dispel or root-break to avoid being pinned in mechanics.

468966.name: Polymorph
468966.notes: CC from a missed interrupt; dispel quickly if the cast completes.

1284627.name: Umbral Splinters
1284627.notes: Discovered from logs (cleared by Detox). Magic debuff; dispel promptly.

1216985.name: Puncturing Bite
1216985.notes: Tank bleed; bleed-cleanse utility or defensive coverage.

1253739.name: Shred Flesh
1253739.notes: Tank bleed + healing absorb; bleed-cleanse or heal through.

1246666.name: Infected Pinions
1246666.notes: Disease that adds group damage; prioritize disease dispels.

1256008.name: Hex
1256008.notes: CC from a missed interrupt; dispel immediately if it completes.

1256059.name: Rending Gore
1256059.notes: DB2: no bleed/dispel mechanic — unavoidable DoT, heal through (NOT a bleed-cleanse target despite the name).

1258806.name: Ritual Firebrand
1258806.notes: Magic debuff that erupts repeatedly; dispel quickly to reduce group pressure.

1259255.name: Spirit Rend
1259255.notes: Dangerous Magic DoT from a missed interrupt; dispel promptly.

1266381.name: Hooked Snare
1266381.notes: DB2: root + bleed. Freedom/root-break for the root; bleed-cleanse for the bleed component.

1271623.name: Frost Nova
1271623.notes: Magic root; dispel or root-break when movement is required.

1249815.name: Transference
1249815.notes: Redirects healing to the caster; immediate dispel — leaving it up invalidates healing.

1281636.name: Creeping Void
1281636.notes: Curse that increases Shadow damage taken; remove before more Shadow damage lands.

1269286.name: Suppression Field
1269286.notes: Snare. DB2 puts the snare mechanic on the parent cast (1269283), not this aura id, so removableBy is overridden here. Freedom / movement utility clears it; not a healer dispel.

1254475.name: Blade Rush
1254475.notes: Bleed from Blade Rush; bleed-cleanse or defensive.

153757.name: Fan of Blades
153757.notes: Boss bleed; bleed-cleanse or defensive coverage.

1258434.name: Curse of Torment
1258434.notes: Curse with a healing absorb + Shadow DoT; remove promptly where a curse dispel is available.

1258437.name: Permeating Cold
1258437.notes: Magic frost DoT + heavy slow; dispel OR clear with movement utility (snare purge clears the whole aura).

1258997.name: Plungegrip
1258997.notes: Physical grip channel; interrupt or Freedom-style utility, not a healer cleanse.

1261921.name: Cryoshards
1261921.notes: Discovered from logs (cleared by Cleanse/Detox). DB2: Magic + snare; dispel or clear with movement utility.

1258459.name: Rotting Strikes
1258459.notes: Discovered from logs (cleared by Burn It Out). Stacking max-health-reduction disease; dispel.

1262930.name: Rotting Strikes
1262930.notes: Discovered from logs. Stacking max-health-reduction disease; dispel.

1262509.name: Chains of Subjugation
1262509.notes: DB2: snare (not root). Freedom/movement utility clears it; not a dispel.

1262519.name: Backstab
1262519.notes: Bleed on a player; bleed-cleanse where available, else defensive.

1280330.name: Rift Essence
1280330.notes: Magic debuff that increases Shadow damage taken; dispel before more Shadow damage.

245742.name: Shadow Pounce
245742.notes: Short dangerous bleed; bleed-cleanse where available.

1282244.name: Vile Bite
1282244.notes: Tank bleed; bleed-cleanse where available, else defensive.

377344.name: Peck
377344.notes: Stacking tank bleed; bleed-cleanse, else defensives/CC/kite.

389033.name: Lasher Toxin
389033.notes: Stacking poison that ramps fast; rotate poison dispels aggressively.
